Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xBC36 "RICOCHET-8000-BC36" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ricochet.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $8000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $8030 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $BC36 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
